title: ImWhy's Shield Optimizer
description: Hold the shield when you really hold it.
body:
## Hold the shield when you really hold it.
The mod fixes the fake protect visual of the shield for the client.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

If have any problems or you have question about this mod
write it in [my discord server](https://discord.gg/vGUHFBgV)

</details>
